title: The Buster Call Begins
description: Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul, Spandine. Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: That's why I came here in person.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: and to dust any uninvolved people.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: He's still here? Take him out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Ohara, Northwest Shore (Jaguar D. Saul's hideout)

dialogue.speaker: Marine soldier
dialogue.text: ... nobody there is nice to me.

dialogue.speaker: Ohara scholar
dialogue.text: I'll stay here with everyone else!

summary: Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.
